filter_analyses:
The question asks whether Ozette Lake, WA is located east of Bears Paw Mountains, MT. To determine east-west positioning, we compare the given RAG values, which are all longitudes (since they are negative and in the format of decimal degrees, indicating positions west of the Prime Meridian). Lower (more negative) longitude values are farther west.

Ozette Lake, WA has longitude values around -124.637 to -124.669, while Bears Paw Mountains, MT has longitude values around -109.517. Since -124 is farther west than -109, Ozette Lake is west of Bears Paw Mountains.

Additionally, there is no overlap in the longitudinal RAG values between the two locations. The values are in the same unit (decimal degrees), so no unit conversion is needed.

There is only one logical interpretation of the question, and the data unambiguously supports a single answer. Thus, the question is CLEAR.

- 106.16113° W
- 106.1611341° W

Since 106.16113° W is east of the range 118.4058° W to 119.0747° W, Kern Lake is clearly west of the Ortiz Mountains.

Since the entire range of Kern Lake’s longitudes are greater (i.e., farther west) than the longitude of the Ortiz Mountains, Kern Lake is entirely west of the Ortiz Mountains.

There is no overlap in longitude ranges, and the units are all consistent (decimal degrees). The interpretation of "east of" is straightforward and unambiguous.

Therefore, the question admits only one interpretation and one correct answer.

- Question 2 should be answered "Yes" (White Bear Lake is east of Bitterroot Range).
